always-on.summary: Generic canary happy-path and blocked-path proof, codex_cli smoke, verify surface proof, interaction-state proof, and observability regression smoke.

integration.summary: Real-review standing proof plus operator-style staged CLI smoke for integration environments.

real-review-success.summary: Strict real-review success proof; this lane only passes when the live reviewer path returns a true successful review.

real-review-fail-closed.summary: Fail-closed real-review proof for environments where reviewer availability must block rather than silently pass.

models-v2-workall-real.summary: Models v2 work-all route proof for the project-configured openai_tool_use executor and codex reviewer wiring; live non-noop acceptance is run as an operator command.
